title: kalimeris mongolica
intro: Kalimeris mongolica, also known as Mongolian aster or Mongolian daisy, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and promoting digestion, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and blood pressure. Kalimeris mongolica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in dried or powdered form in various traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
